title: odontites luteus subsp. linifolius
intro: Odontites luteus subsp. linifolius is a plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae, commonly known as a yellow toothwort or a hair-stemmed toothwort. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Odontites luteus subsp. linifolius include its potential to treat digestive problems, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as its ability to soothe respiratory issues like coughs and colds. Traditional herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
